name: Google Web Vitals
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchandising Cloud is optimized to help meet Google's Core Web Vitals standards by delivering content quickly and minimizing layout shifts, which helps improve both user experience and search engine rankings. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The platform loads critical content efficiently even on mobile devices with slower connections, helping ensure customers can browse and search products without delays."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing performance optimization techniques like DNS prefetch tags and SVG placeholders helps reduce metrics like Largest Contentful Paint and Cumulative Layout Shift. These technical optimizations help ensure search and collection pages load smoothly without blocking content, which tends to enhance both customer satisfaction and SEO performance."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) aims to provide the very best experience for the end user in the ecommerce segment."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to achieve this, we enable websites to show content as fast as possible which reduces waiting time for the users - even on mobile devices with bad internet connection."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We cannot, however, influence any of the other 3rd party apps installed on the store front. As we are delivering critical content to the page, it is up to the merchant to make sure that our scripts are loading first on their site, without being blocked by other scripts."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/M6AH4FWG27LR/d836586-2021-06-30-14-44-56.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/M6AH4FWG27LR/d836586-2021-06-30-14-44-56.png", "name": "d836586-__2021-06-30__14.44.56.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 149805, "width": 1422, "height": 750, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FM6AH4FWG27LR%2Fd836586-2021-06-30-14-44-56.png", "mediaID": 1017, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T17:49:47+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our lighthouse metrics", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Largest Contentful Paint"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This metric is most sensitive on the mobile devices. Google calculates time between first asset request time and the last critical (or large) piece of content in the viewport loaded before the user interacts with the screen."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To reduce this time we have to load visible content as fast as possible and not modify content on the screen before the user touches it."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "First Input Delay"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This metric is about how fast your server returns the data. Most store platforms already have CDN and Cache strategies that make your website load content fast. But the 3rd party apps are usually hosted on other domains requiring additional steps (DNS-resolve) to fetch the content."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We strongly recommend to add dns-prefetch tags in the HEAD section to resolve DNS lookup as fast as possible and not spend time on it when content will be required."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "<link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net\" crossorigin><link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://api-v3.findify.io\" crossorigin>", "code": true}]}], "lang": "xml"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Cumulative Layout Shift"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Following best UX practices, Google asks developers to not extend page layout before the user has interacted with it. To follow this guidance, we created a placeholder generator that allows for the creation of SVG placeholders with the same size as the real content of the search results or smart collections. The Placeholder will extend window height to the size needed for real content and reduce CLS number accordingly."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2PRY81J8E6XK/c7c5473-2021-06-30-15-21-07.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2PRY81J8E6XK/c7c5473-2021-06-30-15-21-07.png", "name": "c7c5473-__2021-06-30__15.21.07.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 114712, "width": 1300, "height": 570, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F2PRY81J8E6XK%2Fc7c5473-2021-06-30-15-21-07.png", "mediaID": 1018, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T17:50:16+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
